stories.title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43
stories.summary: The ex-head of Italy's motorway operator Giovanni Castellucci was handed a 12-year term over the 2018 bridge collapse.

stories.title: Protests in Ukrainian cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
stories.summary: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.

stories.title: Teenager accused of carrying out sabotage actions in Poland for Russia
stories.summary: Polish security services say the aim was to incite ethnic tensions between Poland and Ukraine.

stories.title: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
stories.summary: Explosions were heard across Iran overnight, shortly after neighbouring Gulf states began to report attacks.

stories.title: More than 800 Canadian wildfires burning as air quality alerts extend to US
stories.summary: The air quality in large parts of Michigan, Minneapolis and Minnesota is deemed "hazardous" by authorities.

stories.title: Argentina face action over Falklands banner
stories.summary: Argentina face the prospect of disciplinary action from Fifa after their players celebrate the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
stories.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: World Cup gave bars and restaurants a needed boost as consumers flash warning signs, Fed says
stories.summary: The latest edition of the Fed's Beige Book indicated that the soccer tournament wasn't necessarily translating to broader economic growth.

stories.title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
stories.summary: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

stories.title: Renewed Hormuz hostilities drive ECB rates rethink amid ‘extremely volatile’ outlook
stories.summary: Several consecutive days of strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty on the European Central Bank's interest rate decision next week.

stories.title: China posts slowest quarterly growth since 2022 as investment slumps, fanning stimulus calls
stories.summary: That second-quarter growth came below Beijing's full-year growth target range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal in decades.

stories.title: Consumer prices rose 3.5% annually in June, less than expected as energy prices eased
stories.summary: The consumer price index in June was expected to increase 3.8% from a year ago.

stories.title: India's inflation accelerates to 4.38% in June, exceeding forecasts
stories.summary: Inflation has risen for the eighth straight month in India, as food and energy prices rise due to the Iran war and deficient rainfall.

stories.title: Move over, GPS: Navigation satellites in low-Earth orbit are making a comeback
stories.summary: Xona aims to deploy 258 satellites into low-Earth orbit as a GPS alternative.

stories.title: Hundreds rally at Bethesda HQ to protest Xbox layoffs, and Ars was there
stories.summary: Union wants to halt a "perpetual cycle" of layoffs, get back to contract bargaining.

stories.title: Buzz Aldrin sells famous felt-tip pen that helped launch Apollo from the Moon
stories.summary: While an impressive sale, the pen and switch did not break records.

stories.title: Sheetz is quitting VMware, migrating 11,000 virtual machines
stories.summary: The convenience store chain will use StorMagic instead.

stories.title: Judge: Trump can’t deport researchers just for working in content moderation
stories.summary: Disinformation researchers praise ruling blocking Trump visa denials and deportations.

stories.title: Engineer identifies and explains every '90s computer seen in Jurassic Park
stories.summary: Yes, it was, in fact, a Unix system.

stories.title: Alpaca raises $135M to fund tokenized agent-first infrastructure
stories.summary: The BNP-backed brokerage infrastructure provider is expanding into tokenized markets and AI-native financial services as both DeFi and TradFi companies pursue onchain business.

stories.title: Gambling on random Pokémon cards: Onchain gagcha hits record high as crypto sinks
stories.summary: Users spent a record $324 million on onchain gacha in June, even as Bitcoin hit a 21-month low. The thrill of scoring a top Pokemon card from a random pack is becoming big business

stories.title: Prediction markets defy crypto downturn with record Q2 volume: CoinGecko
stories.summary: Prediction markets reached a record $113.8 billion in notional volume in Q2 as spot CEX trading, derivatives volume and stablecoin market cap declined.

stories.title: MoonPay buys Glide to bolster crypto deposits infrastructure
stories.summary: MoonPay acquired Glide, a crypto infrastructure startup founded by former Robinhood Wallet engineers, to expand cross-chain crypto deposit infrastructure.

stories.title: Tokenized stocks market cap gains to record $2.3B
stories.summary: The market capitalization of tokenized stocks rose to a record $2.3 billion, as investors sought exposure to the growing list of tokenized equity products launched by cryptocurrency exchanges.

stories.title: FATF urges faster crypto AML enforcement as stablecoin crime increases
stories.summary: The global task force said criminal networks are using stablecoins and developing proprietary tokens to evade asset freezes as countries struggle to enforce crypto AML rules.

stories.title: Quantum breakthrough links light and magnetism in atomically thin materials
stories.summary: A new review highlights exciting progress in atomically thin quantum materials where light and magnetism work together in ways never before possible. In these materials, light-generated excitons can interact directly wit

stories.title: Are humans really the ultimate super-predator?
stories.summary: Humans are often described as the planet's ultimate "super-predator," but wild animals do not fear every human the same way. After analyzing three decades of research, scientists found that animals become much more

stories.summary: Four nearby white dwarf stars have been discovered hiding in plain sight beside brighter red dwarf companions. Hubble's ultraviolet observations finally revealed the long-hidden stellar remnants, including one just

stories.title: Archaeologists found Homer's Iliad inside a 1,600-year-old Egyptian mummy

stories.title: More than 400 sick as CDC searches for the source of a mystery outbreak
stories.summary: A growing Cyclospora outbreak has sickened more than 400 people in four states, and investigators are still searching for the contaminated food responsible. The CDC warns the actual number of cases is likely much higher

stories.title: The hidden skeleton “gatekeeper” inside brain cells could help fight Alzheimer's
stories.summary: Researchers have discovered that a microscopic skeleton inside neurons does much more than hold cells together. It acts as a gatekeeper that controls what brain cells absorb and when they absorb it. When this protective

stories.title: Eating chili peppers may raise the risk of one deadly cancer
stories.summary: A major review found that people who consumed the most chili peppers had a substantially higher risk of esophageal cancer, though the evidence was less clear for stomach and colorectal cancers. Researchers emphasize that

stories.title: Claudia Winkleman quits chat show after one series
stories.summary: Winkleman said she was "incredibly grateful" for the opportunity, but had been "too nervous" to enjoy it.

stories.title: The Odyssey is a 'colossal piece of cinema', critics say in rave reviews
stories.summary: The film, starring Matt Damon and Zendaya, is director Sir Christopher Nolan's first since Oppenheimer.

stories.title: Ten unheard tracks from David Bowie's early career to be released
stories.summary: The previously unheard tracks from the 1960s were recorded when Bowie went by the stage name Davie Jones.

stories.title: Jesy Nelson calls plan to test newborns for life-limiting muscle condition a 'victory'
stories.summary: All newborn babies are set to have a heel prick test for Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA) in England.

stories.title: 24m tune in to watch England-Argentina
stories.summary: England's defeat to Argentina in the World Cup semi-final attracts an audience of 24 million on the BBC.

stories.title: Actor Sam Neill died from pneumonia, agent confirms
stories.summary: Neill died in Sydney on Monday, with his family saying his death was 'sudden and unexpected'.
